name: Redemption — E: After-Hours Chat → Owner SMS Alert

parameters.message:
={{ '🔔 AFTER-HOURS CHAT — Redemption Collision

Visitor: ' + $json.visitorName + '
Email: ' + $json.visitorEmail + '
Message: "' + $json.message + '"

Log into tawk.to to respond or text them back.' }}

_setup_notes.step1: Replace REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_PHONE with the owner's personal cell number (+1XXXXXXXXXX)
_setup_notes.step2: In Tawk.to: Admin → Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → Add webhook URL: https://rrichanell.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/redemption-tawkto → check 'chat_started' and 'new_message'
_setup_notes.note: During business hours (Mon-Fri 9am-5pm CST) the workflow exits silently — owner handles chat normally. Only fires alerts after hours.
